title: Intel Completes 18A Process Node, Begins High-Volume Manufacturing
subtitle: Panther Lake and Clearwater Forest ship on Intel's most advanced node yet, completing the 5 Nodes in 4 Years roadmap.
content_html:
Intel announces 18A process node has entered high-volume manufacturing, completing its ambitious 5 Nodes in 4 Years roadmap. Panther Lake and Clearwater Forest are the first products on the new node.

Intel 18A | What It Means

The 18A node positions Intel as a credible alternative to TSMC for advanced semiconductor manufacturing, a milestone that comes after years of delays on earlier nodes.

metadata.title: Intel Completes 18A Process Node, Begins High-Volume
